goals.description: Execute the cohort dinner tonight to demonstrate reliability, explicitly communicating that I am finishing my scholarship application first but prioritizing our connection immediately after.

I will renegotiate the timeline directly with them: 'I've cleared my block for this, let's meet at 8 PM.' This protects the group dynamic while honoring my completed work.
